title: Pwned?
vCleanSub: This password isn't in any known breach
errMsg: Couldn't reach the checker — try again
step2: Split: the first 5 chars and the rest
profTagline: Check if a password leaked — without ever sending it (k-anonymity)
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
